thread_title: Need help with being a dolphin

content:
You're in a pretty decent spot for Caro. Pull for more characters in other realms, that will solve your team building issues since as of right now Saya works with a handful of people most of which come from other realm. 

For spending, the "best" value usually is in the order of buying the monthly pack (if you play genshin, then it is called a welkin for easier terms), then the pre order, then Saya's 3980 pack (Which changes names every patch) and then battle pass and everything else. 

I recommend pushing through story a bit more to expand your pool.
thread_title: Need help with being a dolphin

content: I also don't recommend putting Helot: Catena and Saya together as they are very anti-synergistic
